response_turn1:
Based on the retrieved full text, here is my assessment:

LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such protocol (EAJP-2025) exists in the California State Bar's published rules or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission materials, and several key claims — particularly the blanket UPL waiver under B&P §6125 and the authorization for paralegals to act without pre-filing attorney review — are inconsistent with California's actual, strict unauthorized-practice-of-law framework, strongly indicating this document is invented rather than genuine institutional material.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such protocol (EAJP-2025) exists in any California State Bar or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission published materials, and its core provisions — particularly the blanket UPL waiver under B&P §6125 and authorization for paralegals to act without pre-filing attorney review — directly contradict California's established unauthorized-practice-of-law framework.
